evals.prompt: I need to understand all the API workflows in this project. Can you trace every endpoint from the route handler all the way down to the database and generate sequence diagrams? I want to see the full picture of how data flows through the system.
evals.expected_output: Discovers all entry points (routes, event handlers, cron jobs). For each, traces the full path: route definition -> middleware/guards -> controller -> service -> repository -> DB query. Generates docs/workflow/ directory with per-workflow markdown files. Each file contains a Mermaid sequenceDiagram, Participants table with file:line references, Data Touched table, External Calls section, and Error Paths. Generates INDEX.md listing all workflows with quick stats.
expectations: docs/workflow/INDEX.md is created with a table listing all discovered workflows
Each workflow file contains a valid Mermaid sequenceDiagram code block
Every participant in the sequence diagram references an actual file:line from the codebase
The Participants table has columns: Layer, File, Function, Line
The Data Touched table lists actual database tables with operation types (SELECT/INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE)
Error Paths section lists HTTP status codes with handler file:line references
No guessed or assumed code paths — every claim traces to source

evals.prompt: 워크플로우 분석해줘. 이 프로젝트의 API 흐름을 전부 추적해서 시퀀스 다이어그램으로 정리해줘. 미들웨어부터 DB까지 전부 포함해야 해.
evals.expected_output: Same depth of analysis as eval 1 but triggered via Korean language. Responds in Korean. Full workflow trace with Mermaid sequenceDiagrams. All file:line citations present. docs/workflow/ directory created with per-workflow files and INDEX.md. Generated files are in English, user-facing responses in Korean.
expectations: Skill triggers correctly from Korean language input
User-facing responses are in Korean
Generated workflow files (docs/workflow/*.md) are in English
Sequence diagrams include middleware/guard layer between route and controller
INDEX.md contains workflow count and tech stack summary
At least one workflow traces all the way to a database query

evals.prompt: I just ran /project-scan and I see there are several features listed. Can you do a workflow blueprint? I especially want to see the auth flow and the payment flow in detail, but trace everything you find. Also this project uses NestJS with TypeORM and PostgreSQL.
evals.expected_output: Checks docs/project-overview.md for context from prior project-scan. Detects NestJS framework (decorators, modules). Discovers entry points independently from route decorators. Generates workflow docs for all discovered flows with auth and payment workflows having full depth including middleware guards, service calls, TypeORM repository queries, and PostgreSQL table operations. HARD-GATE enforced: no guessed participants.
expectations: Reads docs/project-overview.md if it exists for prior context
Detects NestJS-specific patterns: @Controller, @Get/@Post decorators, @Injectable services
Auth workflow traces through AuthGuard or similar guard middleware
Payment workflow includes transaction handling if present in code
TypeORM repository calls are traced to actual entity definitions
PostgreSQL table names appear in Data Touched section
If a flow cannot be fully traced, explicitly states what was not resolved
